resources.landmark: Sadly, the nearest Landmark you can access this area from is the Penshia Portal. If you defeat Craven Piggard, you can just teleport there. Otherwise, Hovering Reef 2 --> Ether deposit area could also work.
Hargan Point Camp (Alternately, teleport to Emerald Font for some level 97 merignas. Downsides is tough fights and not great drop rates.
Strongly recommend killing Gracious Titania. However, you can teleport to the Stoneyard, turn around and walk back through the tunnel.
Any landmark close to the water for quick access to the Bravery.
Sea-Gnawed Camp (Use Ship to go to Seatiger Tridence Area)

items.name: Link Force
items.effect: Slightly boosts damage dealt when an ally is down/has low HP; greatly boosts when upgraded

items.name: Omnipresent Blade
items.effect: Boosts damage dealt and Critical Rate by 10% on critical hit; 20% when upgraded

items.name: Opportunity in Crisis
items.effect: Small damage increase based on heat gauge; large increase when upgraded

items.name: Satisfying Piercer
items.effect: On critical, ignore enemy defense. Also increases critical hit damage bonus by 30 percentage points; 50 points when upgraded

items.name: Biting Back
items.effect: Evading deals damage; boosts damage output up to 300%

items.name: Clearsight
items.effect: Boosts evasion rate when attacked by targeted enemy

items.name: Subtle Strike
items.effect: Chance on hit to deal defense-bypassing damage

items.name: Shared Blessing
items.effect: Increases damage dealt per active buff on all allies (max. 500%)

items.name: Unceasing Blessing
items.effect: Pauses the timer for all buffs on all allies (when fully upgraded)

items.name: Wings of Healing
items.effect: 25% chance to heal nearby allies upon taking damage using healing power

items.name: Wings of Pursuit
items.effect: Deals damage to enemies in range each second using attack stat

items.name: Eclipse
items.effect: Decreases all enemies' debuff resistance by 30 percentage points; 50 percentage points when upgraded

items.name: Shared Curse
items.effect: Grants increase to damage for each debuff on all enemies, up to 500% maximum

items.name: Strength Sapper
items.effect: Adds 5% chance to reset enemy recharge when Art hits; 10% when upgraded

items.name: Unceasing Curse
items.effect: Makes duration timers of debuffs on all enemies tick down 50% slower; pauses timer on all debuffs when upgraded

items.name: Hefty Protection
items.effect: Reduces damage taken by allies in a fixed radius by 20%; 30% when upgraded

items.name: Reflection
items.effect: 5% chance to reflect enemy attack; 15% when upgraded

items.name: Steady Advance
items.effect: Grants 50% resistance to combos and reactions while Art is active; 100% when upgraded

items.name: Strength in Adversity
items.effect: Damage increase scaling with enemy targeting, up to 300% maximum

items.name: Explosive Spirit
items.effect: Own combo reactions boost damage by 30%; 50% when upgraded, max 500%

items.name: Extreme Pursuit
items.effect: Small to large increase to damage during combo attacks

items.name: Merciless Pummeling
items.effect: 50%-100% chance for extra damage when inflicting Knockback and Blowdown

items.name: Utterly Crushing
items.effect: Negates enemy guard; 60%-100% chance to inflict Break

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 1
items.hchain: Multiplies TP by 150% when first in line to attack.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 2
items.hchain: When chosen, multiplies TP from next character to act by 125%. (Valid only for this order.)

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 3
items.hchain: Guarantees a "Bravo" rating when character completes an order.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 4
items.hchain: Multiplies TP by 200% when first in line to attack, but TP returns to pre-action state upon reactivation.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 5
items.hchain: When character completes an order, adds 15 to TP of the character with the most TP, and reactivates them.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 6
items.hchain: Reactivates all characters except self when character completes an order.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 7
items.hchain: Prevents order from completing if it reaches 100% through character's action, letting you select another.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 8
items.hchain: When chosen, increases TP by 50 if the enemy is a machine-type.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 9
items.hchain: Adds 15 TP upon own reactivation.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 10
items.hchain: When chosen, grants 10 TP to all active characters except self.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 11
items.hchain: Multiplies TP by 125% when first in line to attack, and makes all attacks critical.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 12
items.hchain: When chosen, increases damage ratio by 50 percentage points.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 13
items.hchain: Guarantees an "Amazing" rating when character finishes an order, but they won't reactivate in this Chain Attack.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 14
items.hchain: Either adds 50 or removes 50 TP upon own reactivation.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 15
items.hchain: When chosen, multiplies the TP of all active characters except self by 120%.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 16
items.hchain: Multiplies TP by 150% when character completes an order.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 17
items.hchain: When chosen, assures self- reactivation in addition to the standard no. of reactivations.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 18
items.hchain: Multiplies damage ratio increase by 1.5x upon completing an order that character participates in.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 19
items.hchain: When character completes an order, adds 30 to TP of the character with the least TP, and reactivates them.

items.name: Battle Manual, vol. 20
items.hchain: When chosen, adds 15 to TP of all active characters, and removes 10 from own TP.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 1
items.hchain: Guarantees a "Bravo" rating when character completes an order.
items.cbonus: Increases Defender aggro by 50% and grants Armor Veil to all allies.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 2
items.hchain: Guarantees a "Bravo" rating when character completes an order.
items.cbonus: Increases Defender aggro by 50% and grants Attack Up to all allies.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 3
items.hchain: Guarantees an "Amazing" rating when character finishes an order, but they won't reactivate in this Chain Attack.
items.cbonus: Randomly increases all characters' TP by between 6 and 18.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 4
items.hchain: Multiplies TP by 150% when character completes an order.
items.cbonus: Increases everyone's TP by 10.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 5
items.hchain: Multiplies TP by 150% when first in line to attack.
items.cbonus: During Chain Attack, boosts damage dealt to low HP enemies by 100%.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 6
items.hchain: Prevents order from completing if it reaches 100% through character's action, letting you select another.
items.cbonus: Increases damage ratio by 100 percentage points and grants Critical Rate Up to all allies.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 7
items.hchain: When chosen, assures self- reactivation in addition to the standard no. of reactivations.
items.cbonus: Increases damage ratio by 100 percentage points and grants Critical Rate Up to all allies.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 8
items.hchain: When character completes an order, adds 15 to TP of the character with the most TP, and reactivates them.
items.cbonus: Increases damage ratio by 100 percentage points and grants Attack Up to all allies.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 9
items.hchain: Multiplies TP by 125% when first in line to attack, and makes all attacks critical.
items.cbonus: Increases damage ratio by 100 percentage points and grants Power Charge to all allies.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 10
items.hchain: Multiplies damage ratio increase by 1.5x upon completing an order that character participates in.
items.cbonus: During Chain Attack, increases Critical Rate by 30 percentage points.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 11
items.hchain: When chosen, grants 10 TP to all active characters except self.
items.cbonus: During Chain Attack, heals 10% of damage dealt as HP, up to 200% of Healing Power.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 12
items.hchain: When chosen, multiplies the TP of all active characters except self by 120%.
items.cbonus: Reduces Attacker and Healer aggro by 100%.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 13
items.hchain: When chosen, adds 15 to TP of all active characters, and removes 10 from own TP.
items.cbonus: Attacks during Chain Attack gain 100% chance to be unblockable.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 14
items.hchain: When chosen, increases damage ratio by 50 percentage points.
items.cbonus: One additional character is reactivated, with 30% chance for 1 more.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 15
items.hchain: When chosen, increases TP by 50 if the enemy is a machine-type.
items.cbonus: Heals all allies for 50% HP and grants them Regenerate.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 16
items.hchain: When character completes an order, adds 30 to TP of the character with the least TP, and reactivates them.
items.cbonus: Reduces enemy ether defense by 50 percentage points during Chain Attack.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 17
items.hchain: Either adds 50 or removes 50 TP upon own reactivation.
items.cbonus: Reduces enemy physical defense by 75 percentage points during Chain Attack.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 18
items.hchain: Adds 15 TP upon own reactivation.
items.cbonus: Attacks during Chain Attack gain 100% chance to bypass defense.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 19
items.hchain: When chosen, multiplies TP from next character to act by 125%. (Valid only for this order.)
items.cbonus: Attacks during Chain Attack gain 100% chance to bypass defense.

items.name: Strategy Manual, vol. 20
items.hchain: Multiplies TP by 200% when first in line to attack, but TP returns to pre-action state upon reactivation.
items.cbonus: 100% chance to revive all downed party members, allowing them to participate in the Chain Attack.
